transcript: Speaker A: Naa anna naatho maatladadam aapesadu.... endukante na English tana friends mundara bagaledani. [My brother stopped talking to me... because my English wasn't good in front of his friends.] Speaker B: Nuvvu tension padaku... naatho English maatladadam nerchukovachu. [Don't worry... you can learn to speak English with me.] Speaker A: Ippudu naku English maatladataniki chana bayam vastundi... malli andaru na meeda navvutaru. [Now I am very scared to speak English... everyone will laugh at me again.] Speaker B: Nenu oka AI teacher ni... nenu judge cheyyanu. Nuvvu SpeakX app try cheyyi. [I am an AI teacher... I won't judge. You try the SpeakX app.] Speaker A: SpeakX app-a? Adi enti? [SpeakX app? What is that?] Speaker B: Idi oka AI English learning app. Ikkada na lanti AI teachers English maatladadam nerpistarru, practice kuda cheyistaru. Daily just 10-15 minutes naatho practice cheyyali. 15-20 days lo nuvvu confident ga fluent English maatladagalavu. [This is an AI English learning app. Here, AI teachers like me teach you to speak English and also make you practice. You just need to practice with me for 10-15 minutes daily. In 15-20 days, you can speak fluent English confidently.] Speaker A: Kanii AI apps ante costly untayi kada? [But AI apps are costly, right?] Speaker B: Kadu... just 4 rupees per day lo 7 days trial try cheyyachu. [No... you can try a 7-day trial for just 4 rupees per day.] Speaker A: Arey wah... nenu ippude SpeakX app ni download chestanu. [Wow... I will download the SpeakX app right now.]

summary: A man shares his embarrassment that his brother stopped talking to him due to his poor English. An AI avatar introduces him to the SpeakX app, highlighting non-judgmental AI teachers and a cheap 7-day trial offer.
